subcodes.first_line: O cherished friend! Concerning the dispatch of books, I had previously written a letter, and a few days ago, through his honor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز در خصوص ارسال کتب مکتوبی از پیش نگاشتم و چند روز پیش بواسطه جناب
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
